title: Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns
summary:
Meta's new AI smart glasses, advertised as an all-in-one assistant offering user privacy control, are at the center of a major data privacy scandal. An investigation by Svenska Dagbladet and Göteborgs-Posten reveals a "hidden stream" of sensitive user data being fed into Meta's systems.

The core of the issue lies with data annotators in Nairobi, Kenya, employed by Meta's subcontractor, Sama. These workers review vast amounts of video footage and transcripts generated by the smart glasses to train Meta's AI. They report seeing deeply private moments, including people going to the toilet, undressing, having sex, and even revealing bank cards or watching porn. Despite discomfort, these employees, bound by strict confidentiality agreements, must continue this work.

Sales staff in Sweden often misinform customers, claiming data sharing is optional or remains local. However, the investigation found that the glasses continuously process data via Meta's servers for AI functions, even with "extra data sharing" turned off. Meta's terms of use explicitly state that "manual (human)" review of user interactions with AIs can occur, and this processing is mandatory for the AI assistant to function, with no opt-out.

Data protection experts, citing GDPR concerns, highlight a severe lack of transparency and explicit consent. Former Meta employees confirm that anonymization algorithms can fail, leaving faces and bodies visible. The article concludes by noting Meta's failure to provide an open interview to address these critical privacy breaches and data handling practices.
chinese_title: Meta的AI智能眼镜与数据隐私问题
chinese_summary:
Meta新款AI智能眼镜被宣传为提供用户隐私控制的一体化助手，却成为一场重大数据隐私丑闻的核心。《瑞典日报》和《哥德堡邮报》的一项调查显示，大量敏感用户数据正通过“隐藏流”被输入Meta的系统。

问题的核心在于Meta分包商Sama在肯尼亚内罗毕雇佣的数据标注员。这些员工审查智能眼镜生成的视频片段和文本记录，以训练Meta的AI。他们报告称看到了极其私密的时刻，包括人们如厕、脱衣、发生性行为，甚至展示银行卡或观看色情内容。尽管感到不适，但这些受严格保密协议约束的员工必须继续这项工作。

瑞典的销售人员经常误导客户，声称数据共享是可选的或数据仅在本地处理。然而，调查发现，即使“额外数据共享”功能已关闭，眼镜仍会通过Meta的服务器持续处理数据以实现AI功能。Meta的使用条款明确指出，用户与AI的互动可能会经过“人工（人工）”审查，并且此处理是AI助手运行的强制性要求，用户无法选择退出。

数据保护专家援引GDPR（通用数据保护条例）的担忧，强调了严重的透明度缺失和未经明确同意的问题。前Meta员工证实，匿名化算法可能失效，导致面部和身体仍然可见。文章最后指出，Meta未能提供公开采访来回应这些关键的隐私泄露和数据处理做法。

title: The Xkcd thing, now interactive
summary: This article describes a project titled "The Xkcd thing, now interactive," which converts an existing concept or idea from the popular webcomic xkcd into an interactive experience. The project leverages the p5.js library, a JavaScript framework widely used for creative coding, visual arts, and interactive applications. Development and likely deployment of this interactive content are handled within the p5.js Web Editor, providing an accessible online environment for both creation and engagement. The core focus is on bringing an element of xkcd to life through user interaction.
chinese_title: Xkcd那个，现可互动
chinese_summary: 本文描述了一个名为“xkcd 那玩意儿，现在可互动了”的项目，该项目将热门网络漫画 xkcd 中的现有概念或想法转化为互动体验。该项目利用了 p5.js 库，这是一个广泛用于创意编程、视觉艺术和互动应用的 JavaScript 框架。该互动内容的开发和可能的部署都在 p5.js Web 编辑器中进行，它提供了一个便于创作和参与的在线环境。其核心在于通过用户互动，让 xkcd 的某个元素活起来。

title: Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable
summary: GrapheneOS has announced via its Mastodon account that future Motorola devices intended for GrapheneOS will support bootloader unlock and relock functionality. This feature is critical for securely installing alternative operating systems like GrapheneOS, enabling users to verify system integrity after installation.
chinese_title: 摩托罗拉 GrapheneOS 设备的 bootloader 将可解锁/重锁。
chinese_summary: GrapheneOS通过其Mastodon账号宣布，未来旨在用于GrapheneOS的摩托罗拉设备将支持bootloader解锁和重锁功能。这项功能对于安全安装GrapheneOS等替代操作系统至关重要，使用户能够在安装后验证系统完整性。

title: British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time
summary:
British Columbia Premier David Eby has announced the province will permanently adopt daylight time, with March 8, 2026, being the last time most residents will "spring forward." From November 1, 2026, when clocks would typically "fall back," B.C. will remain on daylight time year-round, naming its new time zone "Pacific time." Certain eastern B.C. communities recognizing mountain time will not be affected.

Eby justified the decision by citing problems caused by time changes, such as lost sleep, increased car accidents, and disruption for pets. A 2019 public engagement report revealed 93% of respondents favored year-round daylight time, mainly for health and wellness reasons.

While B.C. passed legislation in 2019, it had previously waited for U.S. neighbours like Washington, Oregon, and California to act. However, with U.S. legislation still pending, B.C. is moving unilaterally, inspired by Yukon's similar change. UBC professor Werner Antweiler supported the move, highlighting the "jet lag" imposed by time changes and suggesting B.C. could prompt others to follow.

However, the decision has drawn mixed reactions. Business leaders, including the Greater Vancouver Board of Trade and the Vancouver Airport Authority, expressed concern that moving alone would create "headaches" for cross-border businesses and disrupt airline operations, emphasizing the importance of alignment with neighbouring jurisdictions. The Canadian Federation of Independent Business suggested the move might be a distraction from the provincial deficit.
chinese_title: 不列颠哥伦比亚省永久采用夏令时
chinese_summary:
不列颠哥伦比亚省省长戴维·埃比宣布，该省将永久实行夏令时，2026年3月8日将是大多数居民最后一次将时钟“往前拨快一小时”。从2026年11月1日起，当钟表通常“往回拨慢一小时”时，不列颠哥伦比亚省将全年保持夏令时，并将其新时区命名为“太平洋时间”。不列颠哥伦比亚省东部一些沿用山区时间的社区将不受影响。

埃比通过指出时制转换带来的问题，例如睡眠不足、车祸增加以及宠物生活规律被打乱，来解释此决定的原因。一份2019年的公众参与报告显示，93%的受访者支持全年实行夏令时，主要出于健康和福祉的考虑。

尽管不列颠哥伦比亚省于2019年通过了相关立法，但此前一直在等待华盛顿州、俄勒冈州和加利福尼亚州等美国邻邦采取行动。然而，由于美国立法仍悬而未决，不列颠哥伦比亚省在育空地区类似改革的启发下，正在单方面采取行动。不列颠哥伦比亚大学教授维尔纳·安特维勒支持这一举措，强调了时制转换带来的“时差感”，并认为不列颠哥伦比亚省可能会促使其他地区效仿。

然而，这一决定引发了褒贬不一的反应。商界领袖，包括大温哥华贸易局和温哥华机场管理局，表达了担忧，认为单方面行动将给跨境企业带来“麻烦”，并扰乱航空运营，强调与邻近司法管辖区保持一致的重要性。加拿大独立企业联合会则认为，此举可能是为了转移人们对省级赤字的注意力。

title: MacBook Neo
summary:
Apple today unveiled the MacBook Neo, an all-new laptop making the Mac experience more accessible at a breakthrough starting price of just $599 ($499 for education). Pre-orders begin today, March 4, 2026, with availability starting March 11.

The MacBook Neo features a durable and elegant aluminum design, offered in four vibrant colors: blush, indigo, silver, and citrus. It boasts a stunning 13-inch Liquid Retina display with 2408x1506 resolution, 500 nits brightness, and support for 1 billion colors, delivering sharp visuals.

Powered by Apple's A18 Pro chip, the MacBook Neo offers up to 50% faster performance for everyday tasks and up to 3x faster for on-device AI workloads compared to leading PC competitors. It provides up to 16 hours of all-day battery life, all within a fanless, silent design.

Key features include a 1080p FaceTime HD camera, dual microphones, dual side-firing speakers with Spatial Audio, Apple's Magic Keyboard, and a large Multi-Touch trackpad (with Touch ID on select models). It runs macOS Tahoe, integrating Apple Intelligence and offering seamless Continuity with iPhone. Connectivity includes two USB-C ports, a headphone jack, Wi-Fi 6E, and Bluetooth 6.

Built with the environment in mind, the MacBook Neo is Apple’s lowest-carbon MacBook, featuring 60% recycled content, including 90% recycled aluminum and 100% recycled cobalt in its battery. John Ternus, Apple’s SVP of Hardware Engineering, emphasized its unparalleled combination of quality and affordability.
chinese_title: MacBook 尼奥
chinese_summary:
苹果今日发布了MacBook Neo，一款全新笔记本电脑，以突破性的起售价599美元（教育优惠价499美元），让Mac体验更易普及。预购今日（2026年3月4日）开启，3月11日起正式发售。

MacBook Neo采用耐用优雅的铝金属设计，提供腮红粉、靛蓝色、银色和柑橘色四种鲜艳配色。它配备绚丽的13英寸Liquid Retina显示屏，分辨率2408x1506，亮度500尼特，支持10亿色彩，呈现锐利视觉效果。

搭载苹果A18 Pro芯片，MacBook Neo的日常任务处理速度提升最高达50%，设备端AI工作负载处理速度比领先PC竞品快最高达3倍。它提供最长达16小时的全天电池续航，且采用无风扇静音设计。

主要功能包括1080p FaceTime高清摄像头、双麦克风、支持空间音频的双侧出式扬声器、苹果妙控键盘，以及一个大型多点触控触控板（部分型号支持触控ID）。它运行macOS Tahoe，集成Apple Intelligence，并与iPhone实现无缝“连续互通”。连接方面包括两个USB-C端口、一个耳机插孔、Wi-Fi 6E和蓝牙6。

MacBook Neo在环保方面也表现出色，是苹果碳足迹最低的MacBook，采用60%再生材料，包括90%再生铝和电池中100%再生钴。苹果硬件工程高级副总裁John Ternus强调，它兼具无与伦比的品质和亲民的价格。

title: I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services
summary:
The article expresses strong opposition to identity and age verification for online services, a policy conversation gaining traction in various countries, often linked to protecting children. The author criticizes current proposals as poorly considered, lacking clear objectives, and ignoring broader sociological issues in favor of "technosolutionism."

Personally, the author states they would be unwilling to verify their identity or age for any online service. Due to their "unusual" computing habits, heavily relying on self-hosted services (e.g., RSS, Jellyfin for videos, XMPP for messaging), they feel they could largely abandon or find workarounds for most services that implement verification. They would stop using platforms like YouTube, Hacker News, and even FOSS contribution sites, opting for offline alternatives like Kiwix for Wikipedia, prioritizing privacy, data security, and avoiding what they perceive as censorship.

However, the author identifies a few challenging areas: Signal, for which there's no suitable alternative, and client communication platforms like Teams/Zoom, where professional obligations might force compliance. While acknowledging potential personal resilience to such measures, which they term "self-imposed digital isolationism," they remain broadly opposed, seeing such mandates as detrimental.
chinese_title: 我不愿为任何在线服务验证身份或年龄。
chinese_summary:
文章强烈反对在线服务的身份和年龄验证，这是一项在多个国家日益受关注的政策讨论，通常与保护儿童相关联。作者批评当前的提议考虑不周、目标不明确，并且忽视了更广泛的社会学问题，转而倾向于“技术解决方案主义”。

就个人而言，作者表示他们不愿意为任何在线服务验证身份或年龄。由于他们“不寻常”的计算习惯，严重依赖自托管服务（例如，用于RSS、视频的Jellyfin、消息传递的XMPP），他们觉得他们可以在很大程度上放弃或找到规避大多数实施验证的服务的方法。他们会停止使用YouTube、Hacker News甚至FOSS贡献网站等平台，转而选择像Kiwix（用于维基百科）这样的离线替代方案，优先考虑隐私、数据安全，并避免他们所认为的审查。

然而，作者指出了几个具有挑战性的领域：Signal，目前没有合适的替代品；以及像Teams/Zoom这样的客户沟通平台，专业义务可能会迫使他们遵守规定。尽管作者承认个人可能对这些措施具有抵御能力，他们称之为“自我强加的数字孤立主义”，但他们仍然普遍反对，认为此类强制性规定是有害的。

title: MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max
summary:
Apple announced its new 14-inch and 16-inch MacBook Pro models on March 3, 2026, featuring the all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips. These laptops promise "breakthrough pro performance and next-level on-device AI," with pre-orders beginning March 4 and availability on March 11.

The M5 Pro and M5 Max, built on Apple's Fusion Architecture, introduce a new CPU with the "world's fastest CPU core" and a next-generation GPU with Neural Accelerators in each core. This design delivers up to 4x faster AI performance compared to the previous generation and up to 8x faster than M1 models, enabling advanced on-device AI workflows. CPU performance is up to 30% faster, and graphics performance up to 50% faster than M4 Pro/Max. Unified memory configurations reach up to 64GB (M5 Pro) and 128GB (M5 Max) with increased bandwidth.

Other significant upgrades include up to 2x faster SSD speeds (14.5GB/s) and increased starting storage: 1TB for M5 Pro and 2TB for M5 Max. The Apple N1 chip enables Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6. The new MacBook Pro also features up to 24 hours of battery life, a Liquid Retina XDR display with a nano-texture option, Thunderbolt 5 ports, HDMI 8K, and a 12MP Center Stage camera.

Running macOS Tahoe, the devices integrate Apple Intelligence, offering enhanced features like Live Translation and improved Spotlight. Environmentally, the MacBook Pro incorporates 45% recycled content. Starting prices are $2,199 for the 14-inch M5 Pro and $2,699 for the 16-inch M5 Pro, with M5 Max models beginning at $3,599 and $3,899. A 14-inch MacBook Pro with a base M5 chip starts at $1,699.
chinese_title: MacBook Pro 搭载 M5 Pro 和 M5 Max
chinese_summary:
苹果于2026年3月3日发布了新款14英寸和16英寸MacBook Pro机型，搭载了全新的M5 Pro和M5 Max芯片。这些笔记本电脑承诺提供“突破性的专业性能和下一代设备端AI”，预购从3月4日开始，并于3月11日上市。

M5 Pro和M5 Max基于苹果的Fusion架构打造，引入了带有“全球最快CPU核心”的新CPU，以及每个核心都带有神经网络加速器的下一代GPU。这种设计使AI性能比上一代快至4倍，比M1机型快至8倍，从而实现了先进的设备端AI工作流。CPU性能比M4 Pro/Max快至30%，图形性能快至50%。统一内存配置最高可达64GB（M5 Pro）和128GB（M5 Max），并增加了带宽。

其他重大升级包括SSD速度快至2倍（14.5GB/s），以及起始存储容量的增加：M5 Pro为1TB，M5 Max为2TB。苹果N1芯片支持Wi-Fi 7和蓝牙6。新款MacBook Pro还具备长达24小时的电池续航时间、支持纳米纹理选项的Liquid Retina XDR显示屏、Thunderbolt 5端口、HDMI 8K以及1200万像素人物居中摄像头。

运行macOS Tahoe的设备集成了Apple Intelligence，提供实时翻译和改进的聚焦搜索等增强功能。在环保方面，MacBook Pro采用了45%的再生材料。14英寸M5 Pro的起售价为2199美元，16英寸M5 Pro的起售价为2699美元，M5 Max机型的起售价分别为3599美元和3899美元。配备M5基础芯片的14英寸MacBook Pro起售价为1699美元。
